mapper.insert: insert into interview_message (session_id, message_order, role, content, modality, question_id) values (#{sessionId}, #{messageOrder}, #{role}, #{content}, #{modality}, #{questionId})
mapper.select: select id, session_id, message_order, role, content, modality, question_id, created_at from interview_message where session_id = #{sessionId} order by message_order asc
